what_it_does: A single React hook that centralizes local state, refs, side effects, and imperative handlers for the canvas/graph UI, RHM chat, voice input/output, review walkthroughs, addressable UI indication, live SSE updates, settings, and cognition view, returning an AppController object consumed by region components via context.
observations: Holds roughly 37 useState declarations plus many useRef mirrors used to read live values inside stale closures (EventSource handlers, capture listeners, concurrency guards).
Bootstraps via a useState initializer IIFE that fetches object info, UI registry, capabilities, graph, chat history, config, and opens an EventSource for live updates.
Dispatches SSE events by kind to refresh the graph, config, chat, inbox, review session, and cognition turn frame.
Implements click-to-indicate for ui:// and run:// addresses with persistent DOM classes, modal/chat/builder/help/composer exclusions, and a mobile long-press multi-select variant.
Implements a consent/proposal flow (approve, dismiss, defer, revive, steer) and a shared action-reaction handler for show/run/build/propose/panel/extend.
Implements push-to-talk, hands-free auto-listen with finished-thought judging, barge-in detection, Web Audio scheduling, and a streaming voice turn.
Implements review walkthrough/guide sessions with synchronous ref concurrency guards and bounded start timeouts.
Loads and surfaces addressed help, history, self-changes, freshness, versions, annotations, corpus, and mockup generate results.
Uses setNotice pervasively as a fail-loud user-facing status channel for backend and network errors.
Contains many inline fetch calls and api.* invocations, with broad use of any and several eslint-disable react-hooks/exhaustive-deps comments.
standouts: The useState initializer IIFE for boot + editor.store.listen cleanup is non-standard and the returned state value is unused.
Extensive concurrency-guard pattern combining a synchronous ref gate (wtBusyRef, indicateModeRef, journeyIdRef) with a React state disable.
The voice implementation uses a fresh MediaRecorder per auto-listen turn, a persistent analyser for barge-in, and an epoch counter to drop audio chunks cancelled mid-decode.
resolveUiTarget handles multiple ui:// grammars (region-only, full-string, kind/element) and chooses between DOM spotlight and canvas camera.
foldCognition builds a live turn object from a stream of cognition.* SSE events, seeding cast roles as latent.
conventions: React hooks: useState, useRef, useEffect; TypeScript with pervasive any.
Registry-is-truth / reflects-never-owns / fail-loud principles are heavily commented and drive data loading.
api.* methods are used where available; inline fetch is used for endpoints not present in api.ts.
setNotice is the universal user-facing feedback channel.
useRef mirrors state for reading inside stale closures (EventSource, document capture handlers).
Effects often disable exhaustive-deps with eslint-disable comments.
concerns: The file is very large and mixes many domains, making it a high-churn, high-coupling surface.
Pervasive any weakens type safety and makes the controller contract hard to consume reliably.
Inline fetch calls duplicate request logic and bypass any centralized api normalization.
The useState initializer pattern is unconventional and may confuse readers; the returned state value is discarded.
Several effects disable exhaustive-deps, increasing the risk of stale closures or missed dependencies.
Direct DOM manipulation (querySelector, classList) inside a React hook blurs the React/DOM boundary.
notes: This is the carved-out state container for the former monolithic Hud: one hook to rule them all, with explicit concurrency refs and a fail-loud, registry-is-truth philosophy.
questions: Is the useState initializer pattern an intentional replacement for useEffect, and is the unused returned value safe?
How is the AppController return type consumed given the pervasive use of any?
Are all eslint-disable exhaustive-deps comments justified by ref mirrors, or do some hide real dependency bugs?
What is the intended boundary between this hook and registryStore for state ownership?
Where are the many api.* methods defined and typed?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to extract the former 1070-line Hud into a single state container while preserving behavior verbatim. It does that, but also accumulates many new surfaces (settings, cognition, voice barge-in, journeys, mockup studio), so it is broader than a pure extraction while still being one place.
apparent_themes: Concurrency safety via synchronous ref gates.
Separation of React state from imperative refs for pre-render gating.
intention_signals: Trying to consolidate a previously scattered 1070-line Hud into one maintainable controller while preserving every legacy behavior and adding new human-facing surfaces (voice, settings, studio, cognition) without prop drilling.
novelty: The breadth of live, addressable UI state (indication, address help, history, self-changes, freshness, versions, journeys) combined with the voice barge-in/epoch-cancellation design in a single frontend hook.
contribution: A centralized, ref-gated controller that exposes state and handlers for the canvas, chat, voice, review, settings, and addressable UI surfaces, enabling region components to read shared state without prop drilling while keeping concurrency guards and live SSE dispatch in one place.
summary_for_embedding: useAppController is a large React hook that centralizes state, refs, effects, and handlers for a canvas graph UI, RHM chat, voice input/output, review walkthroughs, addressable UI indication, live SSE updates, settings, and cognition view, returning an AppController consumed by region components.
intention_for_embedding: To extract the former monolithic Hud into one explicit state container that preserves legacy behavior, avoids prop drilling, and adds new human-facing surfaces under a registry-is-truth, fail-loud, consent-first design.

symbols.does: the main hook factory returning AppController
symbols.description: Initializes all React state, refs, effects, and handlers for the application controller; bootstraps data, installs the SSE stream, drag write-back, document click capture, and returns the controller object.

symbols.does: sets the active mockup file and its ui:// locus
symbols.description: Mirrors the mockup filename into React state and a ref, optionally indicates the surface address via indicate(), and stores the pointed element for RHM context.

symbols.does: loads the gallery corpus from /api/corpus
symbols.description: Fetches the disk-backed corpus list and surfaces any backend or network error in corpusErr.

symbols.does: loads the annotation thread for a ui:// address
symbols.description: GETs /api/annotations for the indicated locus, normalizes thread/list/object responses, and sets annotationsBusy state.

symbols.does: type alias for a consent option
symbols.description: Describes one selectable option inside a proposal card, including verb, address, args, label, and summary.

symbols.does: deduplicates and merges events by seq
symbols.description: Merges incoming events into existing state keyed by seq, sorted newest-first and capped at 200, preventing duplicate React keys.

symbols.does: folds a cognition SSE event into the live turn frame
symbols.description: Builds or updates the current cognition turn object from turn.start, role.fire/ran, inject, part, and turn.done events.

symbols.does: ensures a role entry exists in the turn roles map
symbols.description: Helper inside foldCognition that creates a default latent role record before updating it.

symbols.does: refreshes live surface data
symbols.description: Fetches now/events/inbox/lastChange/panels in parallel and surfaces any failure as a notice.

symbols.does: loads live model lists per kind
symbols.description: Fetches chat and embed model registries independently, capturing per-kind errors in fleet state.

symbols.does: opens a course-of-action decision surface
symbols.description: Fetches /api/coa for a decision id and sets surf state with framing and code.

symbols.does: mirrors graph node config into a ref
symbols.description: Builds a nodeId->config map, compares JSON to avoid unnecessary re-renders, and bumps configTick when changed.

symbols.does: opens the SSE live event stream
symbols.description: Creates an EventSource at /api/stream, dispatches incoming events by kind to refresh graph, config, chat, inbox, review session, and cognition turn.

symbols.does: reloads graph and surface state
symbols.description: Calls loadGraph, syncs edges/config, repaints stuck nodes, polls, and triggers maybeReact.

symbols.does: zooms to fit all nodes with chrome padding
symbols.description: Measures actual rail/toolbar/overlay geometry and zooms to bounds with dynamic padding.

symbols.does: measures width of a DOM selector
symbols.description: Helper returning getBoundingClientRect().width or 0 for fitGraph padding.

symbols.does: measures height of a DOM selector
symbols.description: Helper returning getBoundingClientRect().height or 0 for fitGraph padding.

symbols.does: probes watch-and-react mode
symbols.description: Calls /api/react after reload; on comment, refreshes chat history and surfaces failures.

symbols.does: adds a node at the viewport center
symbols.description: POSTs a new node with a jittered viewport position, reloads, selects and flashes the new shape.

symbols.does: wires two selected nodes left-to-right
symbols.description: Sorts selection by x, picks first output/input ports, and calls api.connect.

symbols.does: creates an edge from a drag connection
symbols.description: Backend-owned wire creation; updates edges and config on success or surfaces error.

symbols.does: writes one config key on a node
symbols.description: POSTs /api/set merge update, syncs config, and refreshes the shape.

symbols.does: surfaces a node's output to the inbox
symbols.description: Calls /api/surface-output and polls to refresh inbox.

symbols.does: prefills the GROW panel from a node's output
symbols.description: Clears name, sets spec, clears surf, and updates growMsg.

symbols.does: deletes selected nodes with confirmation
symbols.description: Shows a browser confirm naming the node ids, then deletes each and reloads.

symbols.does: removes persistent indication styling
symbols.description: Clears .ui-indicated class and data-click-mode from all elements before a new indication.

symbols.does: classifies a bare click as annotate or operate
symbols.description: Returns 'operate' for run:// addresses, 'annotate' for ui://, matching backend route_click semantics.

symbols.does: sets the indicated ui:// locus
symbols.description: Updates ref/state, paints DOM cue, records journey step if recording, and shows notice.

symbols.does: toggles point-to-indicate mode
symbols.description: Flips the ref and state; when turning off, clears any active indication.

symbols.does: appends an indicated address to a journey
symbols.description: POSTs /api/journey-step and surfaces step count or errors.

symbols.does: attaches a comment to the indicated ui:// locus
symbols.description: POSTs /api/annotate with text, surfaces errors, and re-fetches annotations.

symbols.does: requests a plan-mode generate for a mockup
symbols.description: Calls /api/mockup-generate in plan mode, stores result, and surfaces what would change.

symbols.does: mints a build-intent at the indicated ui:// locus
symbols.description: POSTs /api/intent-at with the operator's description, polls inbox, and returns the minted item.

symbols.does: toggles a ui:// address in the mobile pointed set
symbols.description: Adds or removes an address from the multi-select set, paints .ui-pointed, and indicates the last pointed address.

symbols.does: clears the mobile pointed set
symbols.description: Empties ref/state, removes .ui-pointed classes, and clears indication.

symbols.does: pointerdown handler for mobile long-press point
symbols.description: Starts a timer to togglePointed after HOLD_MS if the target carries a full address and is not in a conversing region.

symbols.does: pointermove handler for mobile long-press
symbols.description: Cancels the long-press timer if the pointer moves beyond MOVE_PX.

symbols.does: pointerup handler for mobile long-press
symbols.description: Cancels the long-press timer on release if it hasn't fired.

symbols.does: contextmenu suppressor for mobile long-press
symbols.description: Prevents the default context menu when a long-press point fired.

symbols.does: document click capture for indication
symbols.description: In indicate mode, resolves nearest data-ui-ref, excludes chat/builder/help/composer/modal regions, and toggles indication.

symbols.does: loads the help bundle for a ui:// address
symbols.description: GETs /api/address-help, normalizes legs_present and presentation prefs, and surfaces errors.

symbols.does: records a presentation preference for the locus
symbols.description: POSTs /api/presentation-pref and re-fetches address help so the surface re-renders adapted.

symbols.does: loads addressed event history
symbols.description: GETs /api/address-history for the indicated locus and surfaces errors.

symbols.does: loads self-change audit for the locus
symbols.description: GETs /api/self-changes scoped to the indicated address, carrying stale/note flags.

symbols.does: reverts a self-change by sha
symbols.description: Calls api.revert, refreshes types/self-changes/lastChange, and confirms via notice.

symbols.does: sends an operator message to the RHM
symbols.description: Builds focus.selected from review mockup, indicated address, and selected nodes; chooses streaming or non-streaming chat; handles result.

symbols.does: shared post-turn handler for chat
symbols.description: Applies history, thread id, polls, speaks reply, surfaces proposal, and dispatches action reactions.

symbols.does: reacts to an executed action
symbols.description: Reloads graph on run/build, resolves show targets, surfaces proposals/panels/extensions from /api/surfaced.

symbols.does: commits a proposed action via /api/act
symbols.description: Fires chosen verb/address/args, applies reactions, resolves revived inbox item, and clears proposal.

symbols.does: sends a refinement steer back to the RHM
symbols.description: Composes a message referencing the standing offer and reuses sendChat to get a refined proposal.

symbols.does: queues the live offer to the inbox
symbols.description: POSTs /api/defer-offer with full proposal shape, polls inbox, and clears card.

symbols.does: drops the live offer without queuing
symbols.description: Clears proposal and notifies that the offer was set aside.

symbols.does: rejects the live offer
symbols.description: Clears proposal; if revived from inbox, resolves it rejected and polls.

symbols.does: reopens a deferred offer from the inbox
symbols.description: Fetches /api/revive-offer, restores proposal with _sid, brings RHM sheet forward.

symbols.does: changes presence mode and starts walkthrough if selected
symbols.description: Sets mode, polls, and for walkthrough mode starts a bounded session with timeout guard.

symbols.does: starts a model-free guided tour
symbols.description: POSTs /api/guide/start, persists session, and drives per-step view/narration effects.

symbols.does: switches the active persona and loads its voice
symbols.description: Sets persona, calls api.voiceSwitch, polls service up-status, and updates config.

symbols.does: loads read-only registries for Settings
symbols.description: Fetches capabilities, roles, voice paths, voice status, and cognition projections independently with error aggregation.

symbols.does: opens the Settings modal and loads data
symbols.description: Sets tab, opens modal, and triggers loadSettingsData.

symbols.does: writes one rhm config slot
symbols.description: Calls api.setRhmConfig for a single key, mirrors returned config, and polls.

symbols.does: refreshes the cognition run index
symbols.description: Fetches /api/cognition/runs and updates cogRuns/cogErr/cogBusy.

symbols.does: fires a cognition role over an utterance
symbols.description: POSTs /api/cognition/run-role, stores result, refreshes run index, and surfaces errors.

symbols.does: creates a cognition role directly
symbols.description: POSTs /api/cognition/create-role, refreshes projections, and surfaces authoring errors.

symbols.does: cycles the canvas layer view
symbols.description: Toggles layerView 0/1/2 and applies corresponding body classes with notice.

symbols.does: creates a portal node for the selected node
symbols.description: Adds a portal node referencing the selected node's run:// address and reloads.

symbols.does: drives the view to any addressable target
symbols.description: Routes node-ids to canvas camera, ui:// addresses to DOM spotlight or region opening, handling region-only and full-string grammars.

symbols.does: scrolls and rings a DOM element by data-ui-ref
symbols.description: Deferred DOM query, scrollIntoView, transient .ui-spotlight class, and notice.

symbols.does: selects and zooms to a graph node
symbols.description: Resolves node id to shape, selects it, and zooms with animation; fails loud if missing.

symbols.does: starts a review walk over inbox items
symbols.description: Bounded api.reviewStart call, persists session id, and initializes walk state.

symbols.does: refreshes the current review session
symbols.description: Fetches present_current for a session id, updates session, or ends walk on error.

symbols.does: closes the active walk/guide session
symbols.description: Clears session, spokenFor guard, localStorage, and clears indication if it was a guide.

symbols.does: submits a verdict for the current walk step
symbols.description: Calls api.resolveStep with choice/why/session/cursor, marks responded, and polls inbox.

symbols.does: advances the review walk
symbols.description: Calls api.reviewNext, updates session or marks done, with concurrency guard.

symbols.does: derives stale status for a cached node
symbols.description: GETs /api/stale-at for run:// addresses with cached/ran status and surfaces unknown reasons.

symbols.does: chooses the address whose versions to load
symbols.description: Returns portal config.ref for portals or the node's own run:// address.

symbols.does: loads ref version history
symbols.description: GETs /api/ref-versions for the versioned address and surfaces errors.

symbols.does: runs the graph or forces specific nodes
symbols.description: Sets running state/clock, calls api.run, refreshes graph, applies stuck nodes, polls, and surfaces errors in runError.

symbols.does: updates stuck node set from latest run event
symbols.description: Reads the most recent run event's stuck/ran arrays and repaints shapes.

symbols.does: writes stuck overlay onto tldraw shapes
symbols.description: Updates node shape status prop to 'stuck' or 'idle' based on stuckNodes ref.

symbols.does: dispatches a grow/build proposal
symbols.description: Validates name/spec, calls api.propose, sets surf or error, and polls.

symbols.does: unlocks/resumes the Web Audio context
symbols.description: Creates AudioContext if needed and resumes it during a user gesture for later playback.

symbols.does: plays a wav buffer through Web Audio or fallback
symbols.description: Decodes and schedules buffer after existing queued audio, tracks sources, and respects barge-in epoch.

symbols.does: cancels all queued and playing audio
symbols.description: Bumps epoch, stops live sources, and resets play cursor.

symbols.does: speaks text via TTS
symbols.description: Fetches TTS blob and plays it as a whole reply.

symbols.does: converts base64 string to ArrayBuffer
symbols.description: Decodes base64 and returns an ArrayBuffer for audio playback.

symbols.does: runs a streaming voice conversation turn
symbols.description: Posts recorded audio to /api/voice/stream, consumes ndjson events, updates chat, plays sentence chunks, and handles errors/barge-in.

symbols.does: cancels reply audio and stream on operator speech
symbols.description: Sets barged flag, stops playback, cancels voice reader, and logs event.

symbols.does: push-to-talk voice recording toggle
symbols.description: Starts/stops MediaRecorder; during walk routes to STT verdict, otherwise to streaming voice turn.

symbols.does: stops the hands-free auto-listen session
symbols.description: Sets stop flag, releases mic, barge-ins any reply, and clears recording state.

symbols.does: starts hands-free auto-listen session
symbols.description: Acquires mic, creates persistent analyser, loops listenOnce cycles with barge-in watch and re-arm.

symbols.does: reads current microphone RMS
symbols.description: Computes root-mean-square from analyser time-domain data.

symbols.does: VAD timer for one auto-listen cycle
symbols.description: Watches RMS for end-of-speech pause, snapshots accumulated audio, STT+judge, and fires or continues listening.

symbols.does: detects operator speech during reply playback
symbols.description: Monitors RMS with raised threshold; sustained speech triggers bargeIn.

symbols.does: switches push-to-talk/auto-listen mode
symbols.description: Stops live session, writes voice_input_mode via setRhmConfig, and updates cfg.

symbols.does: applies arbitrary rhm config updates
symbols.description: Calls api.setRhmConfig and mirrors returned config.

symbols.does: sets a single brain knob
symbols.description: Wraps applyRhm with brain_knobs object.

symbols.does: sets a model's context window
symbols.description: Calls api.modelConfig, restarts service, and refreshes chat model rows.

symbols.does: recomputes GPU fit for current selection
symbols.description: Builds service keys for brain and voice, calls /api/fit, and stores report.

symbols.does: starts a down voice/STT service
symbols.description: Calls api.modelLoad and refreshes voice status after delay.

symbols.does: selects and optionally loads a chat model
symbols.description: Sets model/base_url, loads service if down, and refreshes model rows.

symbols.does: refreshes conversation thread list
symbols.description: Fetches /api/conversations and updates threads.

symbols.does: starts a new RHM conversation
symbols.description: Calls api.newConversation, clears chat, sets threadId, and refreshes list.

symbols.does: loads an existing conversation
symbols.description: Fetches history by thread id, sets threadId/chat, and refreshes list.

symbols.does: toggles trial session recording
symbols.description: Starts or stops a trial-session id for conversation debrief.

symbols.does: starts a debrief walk over recorded sessions
symbols.description: Fetches trial sessions, calls startDebrief, and polls inbox.

symbols.does: toggles voice output globally
symbols.description: Writes voice_enabled slot and updates cfg/notice.

symbols.does: routes mic press to current voice input mode
symbols.description: Dispatches to stopAutoListen/startAutoListen or recordToggle based on cfg.voice_input_mode.

symbols.does: starts or stops journey recording
symbols.description: Calls /api/journey-start or /api/journey-stop and updates journeyId ref/state.

symbols.does: replays a recorded journey
symbols.description: Fetches addresses and steps through them via resolveUiTarget with pacing.

symbols.does: returns current value for a settings field
symbols.description: Maps field.target to now.mode, cfg.model, or cfg.persona.

symbols.does: writes a settings field value
symbols.description: Routes mode through changeMode or other targets through setRhmConfig.

symbols.does: reverts the most recent self-change
symbols.description: Calls api.revert on lastChange.sha and reloads.

symbols.does: approves and applies a surfaced proposal
symbols.description: Resolves surfaced id as approve, calls api.apply, updates types, clears surf, and polls.

symbols.does: type alias for the hook's return type
symbols.description: Infers the shape of the object returned by useAppController for typing consumers.
